corrections.note: Missing space after verse number before ἔτι.

corrections.current: καὶ ὁ λαός μου τῷ ἀξιώματί μου.
corrections.correct: καὶ ὁ λόγος μου τῷ ἀξιώματί μου.
corrections.note: Body should read λόγος, not λαός; transcript appears conformed to apparatus variant.
Greek middle point present after κῆπον.

notes: Bottom page number 771 and signature 3 C 2 are correctly transcribed as marginalia-like footer content. Apparatus matches scan, including sigla and mg notation.
